name: Feature request
about: Propose new gameplay, UI, or system behavior
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Player problem

<!-- What player experience is this fixing? Concrete situation, not abstract benefit. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- One or two paragraphs. -->

## Charter check (any concerns?)

- [ ] Pillar 1 (authenticity over breadth) — does this add real depth or just surface?
- [ ] Pillar 3 (P2P trading forever) — does this introduce non-P2P trade flows?
- [ ] Pillar 4 (public drop rates) — does this add hidden randomness?
- [ ] Pillar 5 (scarcity honored) — does this introduce reprints or supply expansion?
- [ ] Pillar 6 (closed-loop economy) — does this add real-money item value paths?
- [ ] Non-goals — does this drift toward gameplay/UGC/NFT scope?

If any box is ticked, this needs Chief Engineer + human-owner discussion before any code is written.

## Phase target

- [ ] Phase 1 (closet MVP)
- [ ] Phase 2 (social + shop)
- [ ] Phase 3 (trading)
- [ ] Phase 4+ (live ops / depth)

## Out-of-scope / non-goals for this feature

<!-- Bound the work. What's intentionally NOT included. -->
